name: flight-recorder
description: Record and review local Codex flights with screen, input, action, and exact-frame evidence.

interface.shortDescription: Record and inspect local Codex flights
interface.longDescription: Arm a monitor, automatically record Codex turns, navigate a friendly color-coded board of observed Windows activity, pause on exact captured frames, and hand off a visible stack of shared screenshots through MCP while retaining the complete raw debug timeline.
defaultPrompt: Open my recorder and show its current status
Find visual evidence from my latest recorded session
